name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES
  state,
  turn

State == [proc \in 1..N |-> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
Turn == 1..N

Init == /\ state = [proc \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          /\ turn' = p
          /\ \A q \in 1..N : q /= p
                /\ state[q] /= "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
          \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
             /\ UNCHANGED turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in State
          /\ turn \in Turn

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  Coordinator,
  Participants

ASSUME
  Coordinator \notin Participants

VARIABLES
  state,
  votes,
  decision

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
  /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"Yes", "No"}]
  /\ decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "Pending"}

Init ==
  /\ state = "Init"
  /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "Yes"]
  /\ decision = "Pending"

Prepare ==
  /\ state = "Init"
  /\ state' = "Prepared"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision>>

VoteYes ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![Coordinator] = "Yes"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, decision>>

VoteNo ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![Coordinator] = "No"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, decision>>

Commit ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "Yes"]
  /\ decision' = "Commit"
  /\ state' = "Committed"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<votes>>

Abort ==
  /\ state = "Prepared"
  /\ decision' = "Abort"
  /\ state' = "Aborted"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<votes>>

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, decision>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES
  forks,
  philosophers

TypeOK ==
  /\ forks \in 1..N
  /\ philosophers \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init ==
  /\ forks = 1
  /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       philosophers[i] = "thinking" /\ forks = i
       /\ forks' = (i \mod N) + 1
       /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       philosophers[i] = "hungry" /\ forks = i
       /\ forks' = (i \mod N) + 1
       /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       philosophers[i] = "eating" /\ forks = (i \mod N) + 1
       /\ forks' = i
       /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, philosophers>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES
  flag,
  ticket

TypeOK == /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ ticket \in [1..N -> Nat]

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ ticket = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ ticket' = [ticket EXCEPT ![i] = Max(ticket) + 1]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, ticket>>

Safety == \A i, j \in 1..N :
            /\ i /= j
            /\ ticket[i] /= 0
            /\ ticket[j] /= 0
            /\ ticket[i] < ticket[j]
            \/ ticket[i] = ticket[j] /\ i < j

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES
  queue,
  producerBlocked,
  consumerBlocked

vars == <<queue, producerBlocked, consumerBlocked>>

Init == /\ queue = {}
        /\ producerBlocked = FALSE
        /\ consumerBlocked = FALSE

ProducerEnqueue(item) ==
  /\ producerBlocked = FALSE
  /\ Len(queue) < K
  /\ queue' = Append(queue, item)
  /\ producerBlocked' = FALSE
  /\ consumerBlocked' = consumerBlocked
  /\ UNCHANGED <<producerBlocked, consumerBlocked>>

ConsumerDequeue ==
  /\ consumerBlocked = FALSE
  /\ Len(queue) > 0
  /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
  /\ consumerBlocked' = FALSE
  /\ producerBlocked' = producerBlocked
  /\ UNCHANGED <<producerBlocked, consumerBlocked>>

Next == \/ ProducerEnqueue(item)
        \/ ConsumerDequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ queue \in Seq(1..K)
          /\ Len(queue) <= K
          /\ producerBlocked \in BOOLEAN
          /\ consumerBlocked \in BOOLEAN

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  N,
  Majority

VARIABLES
  state,
  currentTerm,
  votedFor,
  votesReceived

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {None}]
  /\ votesReceived \in [1..N -> Nat]

Init ==
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> None]
  /\ votesReceived = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

RequestVote(i, j, t) ==
  /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
  /\ currentTerm = t
  /\ votedFor[i] = None \/ votedFor[i] = j
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = j]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, currentTerm, votesReceived>>

Vote(i, j, t) ==
  /\ state[i] = "Follower"
  /\ currentTerm <= t
  /\ votedFor[i] = None \/ votedFor[i] = j
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = j]
  /\ currentTerm' = t
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votesReceived>>

RequestVoteTimeout(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "Follower"
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = None]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votesReceived>>

VoteReceived(i, t) ==
  /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
  /\ currentTerm = t
  /\ votesReceived' = [votesReceived EXCEPT ![i] = votesReceived[i] + 1]
  /\ IF votesReceived[i] + 1 >= Majority
     THEN state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]
     ELSE UNCHANGED state
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

LeaderHeartbeat(i, t) ==
  /\ state[i] = "Leader"
  /\ currentTerm' = t
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votedFor, votesReceived>>

Next ==
  \/ \E i, j \in 1..N: RequestVote(i, j, currentTerm)
  \/ \E i, j \in 1..N: Vote(i, j, currentTerm)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N: RequestVoteTimeout(i)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N: VoteReceived(i, currentTerm)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N: LeaderHeartbeat(i, currentTerm)

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, currentTerm, votedFor, votesReceived>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  Writer,
  Readers

VARIABLES
  readers,
  writer_active

vars == <<readers, writer_active>>

Init == /\ readers = {}
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadAcquire(r) == /\ r \in Readers
                  /\ writer_active = FALSE
                  /\ readers' = readers \cup {r}
                  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReadRelease(r) == /\ r \in Readers
                  /\ r \in readers
                  /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
                  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

WriteAcquire == /\ writer_active = FALSE
                /\ readers = {}
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriteRelease == /\ writer_active = TRUE
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == \/ \E r \in Readers : ReadAcquire(r)
       \/ \E r \in Readers : ReadRelease(r)
       \/ WriteAcquire
       \/ WriteRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ readers \subseteq Readers
          /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES
  state,
  channelState,
  recorded,
  markersSent

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [1..N -> 1..N]
  /\ channelState \in [1..N -> 1..N]
  /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
  /\ markersSent \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init ==
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
  /\ channelState = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ recorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
  /\ markersSent = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

SendMarker(i) ==
  /\ markersSent[i] = FALSE
  /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
  /\ markersSent' = [markersSent EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded>>

ReceiveMarker(i) ==
  /\ channelState[i] = 1
  /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = i + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<markersSent>>

SendData(i) ==
  /\ channelState[i] = 0
  /\ channelState' = channelState
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = i + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<markersSent, recorded>>

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : SendMarker(i)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : ReceiveMarker(i)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : SendData(i)

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channelState, recorded, markersSent>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

vars == << token >>

Init == token = 1

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  Keys,
  Values

VARIABLES
  store,
  client,
  request,
  response

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ client \in Keys
  /\ request \in {"Put", "Get"}
  /\ response \in Values

Init == /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> "null"]
  /\ client = CHOOSE k \in Keys : store[k] = "null"
  /\ request = "null"
  /\ response = "null"

Next == \/ /\ client' = client
   /\ request' = request
   /\ response' = response
   /\ client' = CHOOSE k \in Keys : store[k] = "null"
   /\ request' = "Put"
   /\ response' = "null"
   /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![client'] = CHOOSE v \in Values : v /= "null"]
   \/ /\ client' = client
   /\ request' = request
   /\ response' = response
   /\ client' = CHOOSE k \in Keys : store[k] /= "null"
   /\ request' = "Get"
   /\ response' = store[client']
   /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store, client, request, response>> /\ TypeOK

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES
  ballot,
  promised,
  accepted,
  decided

TypeOK == /\ ballot \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ promised \in [1..M -> 0..N]
          /\ accepted \in [1..M -> [ballot: 0..N, value: V]]
          /\ decided \in V

Init == /\ ballot = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ promised = [i \in 1..M |-> 0]
        /\ accepted = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> CHOOSE v \in V : TRUE]]
        /\ decided = CHOOSE v \in V : TRUE

Prepare(p, b) == /\ b > promised[p]
                 /\ promised' = [promised EXCEPT ![p] = b]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, accepted, decided>>

Promise(p, b, v) == /\ b = promised[p]
                    /\ accepted' = [accepted EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, decided>>

Accept(p, b, v) == /\ b = promised[p]
                    /\ accepted' = [accepted EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, decided>>

Accepted(p, b, v) == /\ b = promised[p]
                     /\ accepted' = [accepted EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, decided>>

Decide(v) == /\ decided' = v
              /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, accepted>>

Next == \/ \E p \in 1..M, b \in 1..N: Prepare(p, b)
       \/ \E p \in 1..M, b \in 1..N, v \in V: Promise(p, b, v)
       \/ \E p \in 1..M, b \in 1..N, v \in V: Accept(p, b, v)
       \/ \E p \in 1..M, b \in 1..N, v \in V: Accepted(p, b, v)
       \/ \E v \in V: Decide(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballot, promised, accepted, decided>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  DB,          \* Set of database keys
  Txn,         \* Set of transaction identifiers
  Value        \* Set of possible values

VARIABLES
  db,          \* Mapping from keys to values
  active,      \* Set of active transactions
  snapshot,    \* Mapping from transactions to snapshots
  writes       \* Mapping from transactions to write sets

Init ==
  /\ db = [k \in DB |-> 0]
  /\ active = {}
  /\ snapshot = [t \in Txn |-> db]
  /\ writes = [t \in Txn |-> [k \in DB |-> 0]]

Read(t, k) ==
  /\ t \in active
  /\ k \in DB
  /\ db[k] = snapshot[t][k]

Write(t, k, v) ==
  /\ t \in active
  /\ k \in DB
  /\ v \in Value
  /\ writes[t][k] = v

Commit(t) ==
  /\ t \in active
  /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = writes[t][k] \* IF writes[t][k] /= 0 THEN writes[t][k] ELSE @]
  /\ active' = active \ {t}
  /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = db']
  /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t] = [k \in DB |-> 0]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<db, active, snapshot, writes>>

Abort(t) ==
  /\ t \in active
  /\ active' = active \ {t}
  /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t] = [k \in DB |-> 0]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<db, active, snapshot, writes>>

Next ==
  \E t \in Txn, k \in DB, v \in Value :
    \/ /\ t \notin active
       /\ active' = active \cup {t}
       /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = db]
       /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t] = [k \in DB |-> 0]]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<db, active, snapshot, writes>>
    \/ /\ t \in active
       /\ Write(t, k, v)
       /\ UNCHANGED <<db, active, snapshot, writes>>
    \/ /\ t \in active
       /\ Commit(t)
       /\ UNCHANGED <<db, active, snapshot, writes>>
    \/ /\ t \in active
       /\ Abort(t)
       /\ UNCHANGED <<db, active, snapshot, writes>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, active, snapshot, writes>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ db \in [DB -> Value]
  /\ active \subseteq Txn
  /\ snapshot \in [Txn -> [DB -> Value]]
  /\ writes \in [Txn -> [DB -> Value]]

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSynchronisation ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  N,          \* Number of nodes
  epsilon,    \* Synchronisation tolerance
  delta       \* Maximum clock drift per round

ASSUME
  /\ N \in Nat
  /\ epsilon \in Nat
  /\ delta \in Nat
  /\ delta <= epsilon

VARIABLES
  clocks

vars == <<clocks>>

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + delta]
  \/ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] - delta]
  \/ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (clocks[i] + \E j \in 1..N : clocks[j]) / N]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] \in 0..(N * delta)

Sync == \A i, j \in 1..N : Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= epsilon

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES flag, turn, pc

vars == <<flag, turn, pc>>

TypeOK == /\ flag \in [ {P1, P2} -> BOOLEAN ]
/\ turn \in {P1, P2}
/\ pc \in [ {P1, P2} -> {"CS", "NonCritical"} ]

Init == /\ flag = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]
/\ turn = P1
/\ pc = [P1 |-> "NonCritical", P2 |-> "NonCritical"]

Next == \/ /\ pc[P1] = "NonCritical"
/\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
/\ turn' = P2
/\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![P1] = "CS"]
/\ /\ pc[P2] = "NonCritical"
/\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = TRUE]
/\ turn' = P1
/\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![P2] = "CS"]
/\ /\ pc[P1] = "CS"
/\ flag[P1] = TRUE
/\ turn = P1
/\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![P1] = "NonCritical"]
/\ /\ pc[P2] = "CS"
/\ flag[P2] = TRUE
/\ turn = P2
/\ pc' = [pc EXCEPT ![P2] = "NonCritical"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES known, infected

vars == <<known, infected>>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
/\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : infected[i] = FALSE
/\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup {j} |
   j \in 1..N /\ j \in known[i] /\ infected[j] = FALSE]
/\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
/\ UNCHANGED <<known, infected>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ known \in [1..N -> SUBSET 1..N]
/\ infected \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

TypeOK == /\ free \in SUBSET 1..N
          /\ allocated \in [Client -> SUBSET 1..N]
          /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq 1..N
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Client : c1 /= c2 => allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

Init == /\ free = 1..N
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == \/ \E c \in Client, p \in free :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in Client, p \in allocated[c] :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
          /\ free' = free \cup {p}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SimpleBroker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  Topics,
  Subscribers,
  Publishers

VARIABLES
  subscriptions,
  messages

vars == <<subscriptions, messages>>

Subscriptions == [s \in Subscribers |-> SUBSET Topics]
Messages == [t \in Topics |-> [p \in Publishers |-> [m \in Nat |-> BOOLEAN]]]

Init == /\ subscriptions = [s \in Subscribers |-> {}]
        /\ messages = [t \in Topics |-> [p \in Publishers |-> [m \in Nat |-> FALSE]]]

Subscribe(sub, topic) == /\ sub \in Subscribers
                        /\ topic \in Topics
                        /\ subscriptions' = [subscriptions EXCEPT ![sub] = @ \union {topic}]
                        /\ messages' = messages

PostMessage(pub, topic, msg) == /\ pub \in Publishers
                               /\ topic \in Topics
                               /\ msg \in Nat
                               /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic][pub][msg] = TRUE]
                               /\ subscriptions' = subscriptions

Deliver(sub, topic, msg) == /\ sub \in Subscribers
                           /\ topic \in Topics
                           /\ msg \in Nat
                           /\ messages[topic][pub][msg] = TRUE
                           /\ sub \in subscriptions[topic]
                           /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic][pub][msg] = FALSE]
                           /\ subscriptions' = subscriptions

Next == \/ \E sub \in Subscribers, topic \in Topics: Subscribe(sub, topic)
       \/ \E pub \in Publishers, topic \in Topics, msg \in Nat: PostMessage(pub, topic, msg)
       \/ \E sub \in Subscribers, topic \in Topics, msg \in Nat: Deliver(sub, topic, msg)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ subscriptions \in Subscriptions
          /\ messages \in Messages

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES turn, wants

vars == <<turn, wants>>

Init == /\ turn = P1
/\ wants = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
/\ turn' = P2
/\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
/\ turn' = P1
/\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
/\ turn' = P1
/\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
/\ turn' = P2
/\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
/\ turn' = P2
/\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
/\ turn' = P1

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node
ASSUME Node \subseteq 1..N

VARIABLES counts, node

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> 0]
/\ node \in Node

Next == /\ node' \in Node
/\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![node] = counts[node] + 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts, node>>

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> Nat]
/\ node \in Node

AllAgree == \A n \in Node: counts[n] = counts[node]

====
